lines.en: This place has great reviews. I am glad we picked it.
lines.zh: 这家餐厅评价很好。很高兴我们选了这里。

lines.en: Me too. The atmosphere is really nice.
What are you going to order?
I think I will try the grilled salmon.
That sounds good. I might get the pasta.
lines.zh: 听起来不错。我可能点意面。

lines.en: By the way, congratulations on finishing the project.
lines.zh: 对了，恭喜你完成了那个项目。

lines.en: Thanks! It was a team effort, really.
lines.zh: 谢谢！这其实是团队的努力。

lines.en: Still, you did an amazing job. Here is to us!
lines.zh: 不过，你做得太棒了。为我们干杯！
